hero.title: Every PDF tool you need.
hero.subtitle: Your data is a right, not a resource. PDFNeo is a free PDF toolkit where your files never leave your device. No uploads. No tracking. 100% Private.
hero.securityLink: Know how we keep your files safe →

toolsGrid.title: All the PDF tools you need
toolsGrid.subtitle: Every tool runs locally in your browser. Nothing is ever uploaded.

privacy.title: Your files. Your device. Your rules.
privacy.subtitle: PDFNeo was built with a simple principle: your documents should never leave your computer.
privacy.cardText: Processing sensitive documents like bank statements or IDs? PDFNeo is the safest option because it works entirely offline in your browser memory.

noServers.title: No Cloud Servers
noServers.detail: We eliminate the need for document servers, reducing the attack surface to zero.

noTracking.title: Strict Anti-Tracking
noTracking.detail: We have no backend databases, no login requirements, and absolutely no data harvesting.

volatile.title: Volatile Memory Only
volatile.detail: Your data is only as persistent as your current session. Memory is reclaimed once you finish.

auditable.title: Fully Auditable Code
auditable.detail: Our entire implementation is public, ensuring our promise is exactly what it says.

footer.copyright: © {{year}} PDFNeo. Open source under MIT License.

about.description: The story behind the modern, privacy-first PDF editor.
about.missionText: PDFNeo was born out of a simple problem: Most online PDF tools require you to upload your sensitive documents to their servers. We believe in a simple, non-negotiable truth: Your data is a right, not a resource, and it should stay exactly where it belongs: in your hands.
about.missionSubtext: Our mission is to provide professional-grade PDF tools that are fast, free, and 100% private.
about.privacyText: No uploads. No storage. Total control over your files.
about.securityText: 100% local processing using modern WebAssembly technology.
about.devText: PDFNeo is developed and maintained by Kushwinth Kumar. As a developer passionate about privacy and web technology, I wanted to create a tool that users can trust with their most sensitive documents.

security.title: Security & Transparency
security.description: Detailed information on how PDFNeo keeps your documents safe.
security.clientSideText: Your files never leave your computer. We don't have servers that store your documents.
security.wasmText: We use WebAssembly to run powerful PDF manipulation logic directly in your browser's memory.
security.designText: Because there is no "upload" step, there is no chance for a server-side breach or a developer to intercept your files.
security.hostingText: PDFNeo is hosted as a static application. Once loaded, you could theoretically disconnect from the internet and it would still work.
security.redFlagsSubtitle: We are aware that small tools can be suspicious. Here is how we verify our safety:
security.noTracking: No Tracking: We don't use invasive trackers or sell your behavior to advertisers.
security.openCode: Open Code: Our source code is public. Anyone can audit it to ensure safety.
security.noAccount: No Account Required: We never ask for your email or login. Your identity is your own.
security.sensitiveText: PDFNeo is one of the safest places to process sensitive documents like bank statements and legal contracts.

features.title: Built for privacy. Engineered for speed.
features.subtitle: PDFNeo is designed from the ground up to protect your data.

private.title: 100% Private & Secure
private.description: Your documents never leave your side. Unlike traditional online PDF editors, PDFNeo processes every single byte locally within your browser's sandbox environment. No uploads, no server-side storage, and zero risk of data breaches.

performance.title: High-Performance Processing
performance.description: Experience native-level speed for complex tasks. Leveraging modern browser technologies like Web Workers and specialized libraries, we handle large PDFs, high-resolution images, and intricate text extractions with lightning efficiency.

noTracking.title: Zero Analytics or Tracking
noTracking.description: Your privacy is our specification, not just a feature. We do not use cookies, tracking pixels, or third-party analytics. We have no way of knowing who you are or what you are processing — exactly how it should be.

memory.title: Pure Local Memory
memory.description: No persistent storage, no hidden caches. All file data lives temporarily in your browser's RAM and is instantly purged the moment you close the tab or finish your task. Your disk remains clean, and your data remains yours.

instant.title: Instant Execution
instant.description: Eliminate the 'Upload-Wait-Download' cycle. Since processing happens on your own hardware, even multi-hundred page documents begin transforming the second you drop them. No queues, no server lag, just instant results.

openSource.title: Transparent & Open Source
openSource.description: Trust but verify. PDFNeo is fully open-source, allowing researchers and developers to audit our security claims. You can even fork the repository and host your own private instance for complete infrastructure control.
